input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7995 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.graphql-java:graphql-java:2018-07-30T00-23-12-bfee885; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 19.7 tests use APIs that are absent in 2018-07-30T00-23-12-bfee885, such as SchemaParser.parse(InputStream), PropertyDataFetcher.setUseSetAccessible, PropertyDataFetcher.setUseNegativeCache, and DataFetchingEnvironmentImpl.newDataFetchingEnvironment; tests must target the older API, but this is not external setup.

Project source tests for this vintage use extra test libraries such as Spock/Groovy/Jackson/Jetty/RxJava, but core meaningful coverage of schema parsing, schema construction, execution, relay types, property fetching, dataloader, and reactive-streams paths is reachable without adding those as deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. The resolved artifact declares its normal runtime dependencies transitively, and graphql-java is normally exercised in-process by building/parsing schemas and executing queries.
